---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I am frustrated when trying to scrape dynamic Javascript-heavy pages...")

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain any new APIs, UI elements, or database models needed.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought of.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup references, or links to related technologies here.
